info.title: Zorv Finance Application API
info.description: Production API capabilities for the Zorv platform.

post.description:
🔓 **Access:** `Public`

Create a new account structure within the application.

post.summary: Authenticate user session and retrieve access token
post.description:
🔓 **Access:** `Public`

Submit credentials to receive an encrypted JWT payload.

get.description:
🛂 **Access:** `Any Authenticated User`

Verify token validity and sync local state with the database.

post.description:
🔓 **Access:** `Public`

Backdoor endpoint to generate the initial superuser.

get.description:
🛂 **Access:** `Any Authenticated User`

Fetches a paginated slice of the active user's personal financial entries.

post.description:
🛡️ **Access:** `Admin`, `Viewer`

Appends a new financial record block to the active user's ledger.

put.description:
🛡️ **Access:** `Admin`, `Viewer`

Updates mutable fields of a specific financial record.

**Required Parameters:**
- `id` (integer) - The unique ID of the record.

delete.description:
🛡️ **Access:** `Admin`, `Viewer`

Marks a record as deleted without dropping the actual row.

**Required Parameters:**
- `id` (integer) - The unique ID of the record.

get.description:
🛂 **Access:** `Any Authenticated User`

Calculates personal totals, income, and ledger balances.

🛂 **Access:** `Any Authenticated User`

Fetches a limited slice of recent personal activity.

get.summary: Retrieve cyclical income vs. expenditure temporal plots
get.description:
🛂 **Access:** `Any Authenticated User`

Groups personal ledger data dynamically over periods of time.

get.summary: Process and formulate system-wide organizational aggregates
get.description:
👑 **Access:** `Admin`, `Analyst`

Runs intensive, cross-user aggregations for global system health metrics.

get.summary: Compute targeted deep-dive analytics for a specified entity
get.description:
👑 **Access:** `Admin`, `Analyst`

Generates custom reporting vectors on another user's private ledger.

**Required Parameters:**
- `userId` (integer) - The ID of the target user.

👑 **Access:** `Admin`, `Analyst`

Lists system accounts for administrative viewing and targeting.

🔴 **Access:** `Admin`

Highly protected endpoint used strictly for global account manipulation.

🔴 **Access:** `Admin`

Examines the core settings payload of a target user.

**Required Parameters:**
- `id` (integer) - The precise system ID of the user.

put.description:
🔴 **Access:** `Admin`

Strictly delegates specific security roles to lower-tiered users.

**Required Parameters:**
- `id` (integer) - The exact ID of the user whose role is changing.

🔴 **Access:** `Admin`

Completely revokes or reinstates a user's ability to authenticate.

**Required Parameters:**
- `id` (integer) - The precise system ID of the user.
